nodes.context: Loosely organized gangs of street children and teenagers in Lagos, Nigeria, involved in extortion, drug sales, and other crimes.
A confraternity that serves as a facade for the Black Axe, involved in fraud, cybercrime, drug trafficking, and human trafficking.
A Nigerian confraternity/campus gang involved in drug trafficking, fraud, cybercrime, car theft, and human trafficking, operating worldwide.
Italian organized crime group based in Campania, allied with Nigerian groups in prostitution, drugs, and human trafficking.
Italian mafia based in Sicily, allied with Nigerian groups in prostitution, drugs, and human trafficking.
A crime clan in Bari, Italy, allied with a Nigerian crime group in drug trafficking.
Chinese organized crime groups that collaborate with Nigerian mafia in heroin trafficking in France.
Japanese organized crime groups that engage in heroin dealing with Nigerian mafia in Tokyo.

edges.context: The Neo Black Movement serves as a welfare facade for the Black Axe confraternity.
Nigerian groups are increasing alliances with the Neapolitan Camorra in prostitution, drugs, and human trafficking.
Nigerian groups are increasing alliances with the Sicilian Mafia in prostitution, drugs, and human trafficking.
The Nigerian mafia pays a percentage of its profits to the Camorra.
The Nigerian mafia pays a percentage of its profits to the Sicilian Mafia.
Italian police dismantled a drug trafficking scheme between a Nigerian crime group and the Capriati clan in Bari.
Nigerian mafia in France collaborates with Chinese triads in heroin trafficking.
Nigerian mafia in Tokyo engages in heroin dealing with the yakuza.
